trust.label: WHY WPO TRANSLATIONS
trust.title: Built for people navigating bureaucracy abroad
trust.speedDesc: Most documents are translated in under 5 minutes. Traditional bureaus take days.
trust.priceDesc: From ₸1,000 per document vs ₸15,000–25,000 at a translation bureau.
trust.securityDesc: Your documents are stored securely and permanently deleted after 30 days.
trust.sectionTitle: Built on security, accuracy, and accessibility
trust.sectionSubtitle: Every part of WPO is designed for people who can't afford mistakes with their documents.
trust.pillar1Body: Files stored on Cloudflare R2 with server-side encryption and TLS in transit. Permanently deleted after 30 days. We never share your documents.
trust.pillar2Body: Mistral OCR extracts text from scanned documents. The AI model translates with context awareness, preserving names, dates, and numbers exactly as written.
trust.pillar3Body: Payments are processed securely online. No hidden fees.
trust.paymentDesc: Pay via available payment methods. Fast, secure, no hidden fees.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Is this translation accepted by consulates or universities?
faq.a1: WPO offers three service levels: Electronic translation (automated, without an agent/provider stamp or notarization), Translation with agent stamp (human-reviewed, with agent/provider stamp), and Notarized translation (partner process with a notary). Acceptance depends on the requirements of the receiving institution. Always confirm which service level is required before ordering.
faq.a2: Most documents are translated in 2–5 minutes. Complex or long documents may take up to 10 minutes.
faq.a3: We support Russian, English, Chinese, Korean, Japanese, German, French, Spanish, and Arabic as target languages.
faq.a4: We accept payment via available online payment methods. Check the platform for current options.
faq.a5: Your files are encrypted in transit and at rest. They are permanently deleted after 30 days.
faq.q6: Do you guarantee that my translation will be accepted by a bank, university, consulate, or immigration authority?
faq.a6: No. Acceptance by third parties is not guaranteed. Banks, universities, consulates, immigration authorities, notaries, and other organizations may set their own requirements for translation format, signature, stamp, notarization, and accompanying documents. Before using the translation for official purposes, the customer must independently verify the requirements of the receiving party.
faq.a7: Electronic translation is typically fast and may be ready within a few minutes after successful payment and file processing. Official translation requires human translator review and takes more time. Notarization requires additional review, coordination with partners, and may take longer depending on the document, language, and notary availability.
faq.a8: You can upload most document types that require translation: passports, certificates, statements, transcripts, diplomas, contracts, bank documents, immigration and educational documents. The file must be legible. Poor scan quality, blurry pages, heavy watermarks, rotated pages, or handwritten text may degrade OCR and translation quality.
faq.a9: The service supports uploading PDF, DOCX, JPG, and PNG, if those formats are available on the upload page. The final translation is typically provided as a PDF. Exact file size and page count limits are shown on the upload page.
faq.q10: Does a human review my documents?
faq.a10: For electronic translation, no manual review is performed. It is processed automatically using OCR and AI. For official translation, the document is reviewed by a human translator. This service level is selected and priced separately. For notarization, documents may be passed to an assigned translator, notary, or other partner involved in the service.
faq.q11: Is it safe to upload my documents?
faq.a11: The service uses technical security measures including secure data transfer and restricted document access. Uploaded source documents and translated files are stored for a limited period and deleted 30 days after translation completion, unless otherwise required by law or order processing terms. Details are described in the Privacy Policy and Personal Data Processing Consent.
faq.q12: Are my documents used for AI training?
faq.a12: Documents are used solely to provide the ordered service: OCR, translation, formatting, quality checking, result delivery, and customer support. Sub-processors and partners may not use customer documents for their own purposes unrelated to service delivery. A detailed list of sub-processors and processing purposes is given in the Privacy Policy.
faq.q13: Can I cancel my order and get a refund?
faq.a13: An order can be cancelled with a full refund if the cancellation request is made before document processing begins. Processing may start automatically immediately after payment confirmation and order creation. After OCR, AI processing, translation, PDF generation, or handoff to a translator or notary partner, cancellation may not be possible. If the result cannot be delivered or contains an obvious technical error caused by the service, reprocessing may be performed at no additional charge. A refund is provided if reprocessing is not possible or does not resolve the technical error.
faq.q14: What should I do if there is an error in my translation?
faq.a14: If the error is caused by a service malfunction, file corruption, or clearly incomplete processing, contact support and provide your order number. If the error resulted from poor source document quality, an incorrect language selection, an incorrect document type, or other parameters specified by the customer, a refund or reprocessing may not be available.
faq.a15: Payment is made before order processing begins. Available payment methods are shown on the checkout page. Once card payment is activated, payments will be processed through the payment provider indicated on the website. The final price must be shown before proceeding to payment.
faq.q16: How will I receive my completed translation?
faq.a16: The completed translation will be available in your account or delivered via the method shown on the website. Electronic translation is provided in electronic format. Official translation and notarization may have a separate delivery procedure depending on the selected service level and partner process.
faq.q17: Which language takes priority for legal documents?
faq.a17: The Russian version of legal documents is the authoritative version unless otherwise explicitly stated by the provider. Translations of legal pages into other languages may be provided for user convenience. In the event of a discrepancy between versions, the version specified in the relevant document takes priority.

pain.label: THE PROBLEM
pain.title: Translation bureaus weren't designed for your deadline
pain.item1Desc: Traditional bureaus work during office hours. Your deadline does not.
pain.item2Desc: Files sent over WhatsApp and email. No tracking. No transparency.
pain.item3Desc: Choose the service level: electronic, with agent stamp, or with notarization. The final price is calculated based on the selected format, document type and urgency.
pain.item4Desc: The bureau is in another city or country. You need the document today.

security.label: PRIVACY AND SECURITY
security.title: Your documents stay private
security.subtitle: We handle passports, bank statements, and medical records. Security is not optional.
security.item1Desc: Cloudflare R2 with server-side encryption and TLS in transit.
security.item2Desc: Original and translated files are permanently deleted after 30 days. No archives.
security.item3Desc: Translation is performed by AI only. No staff reads your documents.
security.item4Desc: You can request immediate deletion from your dashboard at any time.
security.disclaimer: UNOFFICIAL TRANSLATION — FOR INFORMATIONAL PURPOSES ONLY
security.disclaimerSub: Electronic translation does not include an agent/provider stamp or notarization. Always verify requirements with the receiving institution.
